title: B-Roll Sequence
description: Students capture or collect a short sequence of B-roll clips and submit a simple edited sequence or media evidence according to teacher requirements.
studentTask: Capture or collect a short sequence of B-roll clips and submit a simple edited sequence or media evidence according to teacher requirements.
evidenceRequired: Exported B-roll sequence or hosted link

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets or extends the stated requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete, unclear, or not functional.

reflectionPrompt: Which shot best helped tell the story, and why?
